title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at SSC Tube - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at SSC Tube - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
SSC Tube invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Curriculum Developer at our Patna location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About SSC Tube:
SSC Tube is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Support students with special educational needs
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Patna, Bihar, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with SSC Tube!
